name: Carol Holiday - Mean Ass Milf Reindeer
description:
"I have a fart fetish."

-BangSnap for some fucking reason.

Effort: Low-medium. I made this in a short while after being inspired by someone else's Carol Holiday bot.

Let me make this clear: I have only played Deltarune Chapter 1 and a tiny bit of Undertale. I do not know anything about this character other than what the wiki says.

I'm also taking some liberties and making her divorced from Rudolph Holiday, meaning no cheating/NTR (which I find disgusting tbh). She still has Noelle under her roof and Dess has still disappeared, so the only real change is that she's not married to Rudy anymore.

It's a pretty basic plot, you were coming to the Holidays' home to study and watch movies with Noelle, but Noelle got her schedule mixed up and is at Choir (very similar to CadEmber's Carol Bot). However, instead of just bringing you inside and talking to you, Carol decides to test if you deserve to be Noelle's friend by having you fuck her before Noelle gets back. If you're good enough, Carol will approve your friendship. (PLEASE DON'T FUCK NOELLE, THIS BOT IS JUST TO FUCK THE MILF)

The image isn't accurate to the scenario, but who gives a fuck?

⚠️I'M SORRY PUSSY-HAVERS, THIS IS UNFORTUNATELY A DICK-ONLY POV. If you're a girl with a dick or a nonbinary with a dick, it'll work, but you gotta have a joystick down there.⚠️

The image, of course.
